technical_preamble:
Technical Preamble:
Hero video is a 44-year-old man. Heroine video is a 40-year-old woman. They are a very good, warm couple who met several years ago and now live together. She teaches yoga, leads yoga groups, has lived in the USA, England, Europe, and India, works as a psychologist, and is finishing studies in Chinese medicine and acupuncture. They are very mobile, love travel, and used to spend much time hiking in the mountains. Now they are expecting a child. Their home atmosphere is warm, gentle, and pleasant. Use this only as emotional guidance and keep the final video grounded in the reference images without using personal names.

scenes.description: The man and the woman @image1 walk in the Dead Sea mountains @image1.
The man and the woman @image3 travel toward Africa.
The man and the woman are in Africa @image4 by the sea @image8.
The man and the woman @image5 are happy to be together @image6.
The man and the woman @image9 happily return home @image7, happy and tired @image5.

scenario_variants.label: Variant 1
scenario_variants.instruction: Create the most likely, most suitable, and most coherent interpretation.

scenario_variants.label: Variant 2
scenario_variants.instruction: Create a fully distinct alternative interpretation while preserving the same scene order, durations, and story facts.
